metadata.title: Full Vault Mirror Sync
metadata.description: Full Vault Mirror Sync Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Full source folder path. Defaults to the current vault root.
ast.target: 完整的源文件夹路径。默认为当前保险库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 完整的目标文件夹路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatic sync interval in minutes. Minimum value is 1.
ast.target: 自动同步间隔（分钟）。最小值为 1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run robocopy automatically on the configured interval after you enable it.
ast.target: 启用后，按配置的间隔自动运行 robocopy。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run one sync shortly after Obsidian starts. This only works when automatic sync is enabled.
ast.target: Obsidian 启动后不久运行一次同步。此功能仅在启用自动同步时有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run robocopy mirror sync now after validation and any required confirmation.
ast.target: 在验证和任何必要的确认后，立即运行 robocopy 镜像同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Verify that source and target match after each successful robocopy run.
ast.target: 每次成功的 robocopy 运行后，验证源和目标是否匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Retry robocopy up to 3 more times when post-sync validation fails.
ast.target: 当同步后验证失败时，最多重试 robocopy 3 次。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A sync is already in progress. Skipping duplicate request.
ast.target: 同步已在进行中。跳过重复请求。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Source path is not a folder during post-sync validation.
ast.target: 同步后验证期间源路径不是文件夹。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Target path is not a folder during post-sync validation.
ast.target: 同步后验证期间目标路径不是文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure local folder mirror settings for this Windows-only Obsidian plugin.
ast.target: 为此仅限 Windows 的 Obsidian 插件配置本地文件夹镜像设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: Robocopy /MIR can delete extra files from the target folder so it exactly matches the source folder.
ast.target: 警告：Robocopy /MIR 可能会从目标文件夹中删除多余文件，使其与源文件夹完全匹配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Target-only files may be deleted because robocopy /MIR makes the target match the source exactly.
ast.target: 目标文件夹中独有的文件可能会被删除，因为 robocopy /MIR 会使目标与源完全匹配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Extra files in the target folder will be deleted because robocopy /MIR makes the target match the source exactly.
ast.target: 目标文件夹中的多余文件将被删除，因为 robocopy /MIR 会使目标与源完全匹配。
